The '''Kloodavians''' were small, [[Color/Legends|yellow]]-skinned [[Reptile/Legends|reptilians]]. They had the ability to regenerate lost limbs and were immune to [[Mind trick/Legends|mind tricks]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 1: Search for the Lost Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Episode I Adventures 2: The Bartokk Assassins]]''
*''[[Episode I Adventures 3: The Fury of Darth Maul]]''
